_doc: Independent adversarial QA of the Fleet B wave-1 ownership-evidence queue. READ-ONLY verdict file. qa_status governs consolidation eligibility; the validator (consolidate_census.py) is a SCHEMA/DB gate only and does NOT re-judge evidence — this file is the evidence-sufficiency authority.
UPSTREAM_FREEZE: CONSOLIDATION IS FROZEN regardless of these verdicts. The wave-1 DB reset is NOT done: practice_locations/practices still carry 349 live ownership_tier rows, LEDGER=350 lines, PROGRESS=349 (all must read 0). Until the reset owner clears that, NOTHING here may be written to the DB. These verdicts pre-stage what is consolidation-ELIGIBLE once the freeze lifts.

qa_status_legend.pass_ready_for_validator: evidence sufficient at the assigned tier; consolidation-eligible once the freeze lifts.
qa_status_legend.pass_with_caveat: accept at tier but a noted weakness (single-source / not-exact for a non-headline bucket); eligible, watch.
qa_status_legend.corrected: tier changed by QA (almost all branded/stealth_dso -> dentist_multi for pe_backed!=true). Still Consolidated, REMOVED from DSO/PE-only headline. Eligible at the CORRECTED tier.
qa_status_legend.needs_more_evidence: NOT consolidation-eligible. Must return to needs_verification/undetermined until the named evidence is produced.

headline_effect_legend.dso_pe: counts in BOTH Consolidated (T2-T5) and DSO/PE-only (T4-T5) headlines.
headline_effect_legend.consolidated_not_dso: counts in Consolidated (T2-T5) only; NOT DSO/PE.
headline_effect_legend.neither: true_independent / institutional / held — counts in no consolidation headline.

adjudication_of_fleet_b_question: Fleet B asked whether to PRE-APPLY the branded_dso->dentist_multi (pe_backed!=true) reclass before QA, or leave the queue as-is for QA to adjudicate. QA is the authority on this rule. RECOMMENDATION: leave the queue EXACTLY as-is (do not pre-apply). Reasons: (1) pre-applying would mask the SAME defect in the stealth_dso tier (36 stealth_dso rows also have pe_backed!=true and need the identical correction) and bias the audit toward 'branded only'; (2) QA must see the raw labels to measure the systematic error rate and keep one authority on the rule; (3) this QA file already applies the correction (29 branded + 31 stealth = 60-ish rows -> dentist_multi), so the conformed result exists here without Fleet B mutating its own queue.
key_findings: Fleet B STRUCTURAL hygiene is clean: 0 classified rows with evidence_basis=none, 0 low-confidence classified, 0 DSO tier without a URL/artifact basis, 0 weak-basis true_independent. The defects are SEMANTIC, not schema.

DEFINITIONAL conflict: 36 of 93 stealth_dso rows are classified with pe_backed!=true. stealth_dso IS PE/MSO-backed by definition, so these are mislabeled -> dentist_multi (those that are exact-matched) or held (those that are not).
29 of 49 branded_dso rows are pe_backed!=true -> dentist_multi per the established rule (matches Fleet B's own Webster/1st Family/Family Dental Care heads-up).
16 classified rows lack exact_address_match; for the DSO tiers (13 of them) that fails the T4/T5 exact-address documentary bar -> held.

Fleet B's 'genuine DSO/PE = pe_backed=true' framing is directionally right but still over-inclusive: of its 77 classified pe_backed=true DSO-tier rows, QA retains only ~68 as T4/T5 (9 fail exact-match or are brand-attach-inferred).
The 9 conflicts[] are rows where both lanes independently returned undetermined/needs_verification -> already non-eligible, no QA action needed.
The 24 rejected[] are all DA_-prefixed synthetic NPIs -> correctly rejected upstream; QA concurs (excluded from every denominator).
